# PawPedia

PawPedia is a cat breed explorer for comparing breeds by temperament, origin, weight, grooming, energy, and family fit.

Important pages:

- Home and breed catalog: https://pawpediaa.pages.dev/
- Maine Coon cat guide: https://pawpediaa.pages.dev/breeds/maine-coon-cat-guide

Data note:

PawPedia uses TheCatAPI-sourced breed data for catalog fields and ratings. PawPedia is not a veterinary service; health-related breed fields are informational and should not replace advice from a qualified veterinarian.
